# Christina Montoya

> Christina Montoya is a restaurant and bar hospitality leader focused on service, operations, beverage, guest experience, sommelier perspective, cocktail curation, and team culture.

Christina's background includes restaurant leadership, bar operations, hospitality operations, guest experience, service standards, guest recovery, team development, wine service, cocktail curation, and high-pressure hospitality execution.

## Website

- https://christina-montoya.com/

## Contact

- montoya.christina.m@gmail.com
